evals.prompt: Run a security scan on HikaruEgashira/hikae-vulnerable-python and give me the findings
evals.expected_output: A PDF report with SARIF-based security findings covering SQL injection, XSS, and other vulnerabilities in the Python app.
assertions: parsentry model was invoked and model.json was created
parsentry scan was invoked and generated per-surface prompts
Subagents were dispatched in parallel for surface analysis
Each subagent produced a valid SARIF result.sarif.json
parsentry merge was run before parsentry generate
The summary mentions specific vulnerability types found

evals.prompt: このリポジトリの脆弱性分析をして、結果をレポートにまとめて
evals.expected_output: A Japanese-language summary with PDF report covering all attack surfaces in the current directory.
assertions: parsentry model was invoked with '.' or the current directory as target
All phases (model → scan → merge → generate) completed
The summary to the user is in Japanese
A PDF report file path was provided to the user

evals.prompt: I need a threat model for this API — what endpoints are most at risk?
evals.expected_output: Threat model output listing attack surfaces with risk assessment, focused on API endpoints.
assertions: The threat model identifies API endpoints as attack surfaces
The response explains which surfaces are highest risk
